name: Microsoft App Installer / winget
description: Windows Package Manager. If winget is missing, this opens the official Microsoft Store App Installer page.

name: Chocolatey
description: Popular Windows package manager used when a package is not available in winget.

name: Scoop
description: Developer-focused package manager for command-line tools.
command: Set-ExecutionPolicy RemoteSigned -Scope CurrentUser -Force; Invoke-RestMethod get.scoop.sh | Invoke-Expression

name: Git
description: Version control system required for most development workflows.

name: GitHub CLI
description: Command-line tool for GitHub repositories, issues, pull requests, and authentication.

name: Windows Terminal
description: Modern terminal for PowerShell, Command Prompt, and WSL shells.

name: PowerShell 7
description: Modern cross-platform PowerShell runtime.

name: WSL + Ubuntu
description: Linux environment for Windows. This may require restart and Windows feature enablement.

name: Docker Desktop
description: Container runtime for backend, database, cloud, and DevOps workflows.

name: Postman
description: API development and testing client.

name: Visual Studio Code
description: Lightweight editor for most languages and frameworks.

name: Visual Studio Community
description: Full Microsoft IDE for C#, .NET, C++, desktop, and game development workloads.

name: Vim
description: Classic modal text editor.

name: Neovim
description: Modern Vim-based editor with strong plugin and LSP ecosystem.

name: Emacs
description: Extensible editor and programming environment.

name: IntelliJ IDEA Community
description: Free JetBrains IDE for Java, Kotlin, and JVM basics.

name: IntelliJ IDEA Ultimate
description: Premium JetBrains IDE for Java, Spring, web, database, and enterprise development.

name: PyCharm
description: JetBrains Python IDE. Premium features may require a license depending on edition and feature.

name: PyCharm Professional
description: Premium JetBrains Python IDE for Django, Flask, scientific, database, and web work.

name: Android Studio
description: Official Android app development IDE.

name: Eclipse IDE
description: Classic Java and plugin-based IDE.

name: VS Code Engineering Extensions
description: Installs common VS Code extensions for Python, Java, C/C++, C#, Docker, GitHub, ESLint, Prettier, Jupyter, PHP, and GitLens.
command: code --install-extension ms-python.python; code --install-extension ms-python.vscode-pylance; code --install-extension ms-toolsai.jupyter; code --install-extension ms-vscode.cpptools; code --install-extension ms-dotnettools.csharp; code --install-extension vscjava.vscode-java-pack; code --install-extension dbaeumer.vscode-eslint; code --install-extension esbenp.prettier-vscode; code --install-extension ms-azuretools.vscode-docker; code --install-extension eamodio.gitlens; code --install-extension xdebug.php-debug; code --install-extension ziglang.vscode-zig

name: Cursor
description: AI-first code editor. Some features require paid plans.

name: Claude Desktop
description: Anthropic Claude desktop app. Paid plans may unlock higher limits and features.

name: ChatGPT Desktop
description: OpenAI ChatGPT desktop app or official download page fallback.

name: Gemini Web App
description: Google Gemini resource shortcut.

name: OpenAI Codex CLI
description: OpenAI Codex command-line coding agent. Installs through npm after Node.js is available.

name: GitHub Copilot
description: Premium AI coding assistant. Opens the official setup page because IDE login and subscription are required.

name: Python
description: Python runtime with launcher and PATH registration.

name: Python Core Libraries
description: Common Python packages for data, web, testing, formatting, notebooks, scraping, and APIs.
command: py -m pip install --upgrade pip setuptools wheel numpy pandas matplotlib seaborn scikit-learn scipy jupyter notebook ipykernel requests beautifulsoup4 lxml flask django fastapi uvicorn sqlalchemy psycopg2-binary pytest black ruff mypy virtualenv

name: Java JDK 21
description: LTS Java Development Kit for Java and Spring Boot.

name: Apache Maven
description: Java build tool commonly used with Spring Boot.

name: Gradle
description: Modern JVM build system used for Java, Kotlin, Android, and Spring projects.

name: Node.js LTS
description: JavaScript runtime and npm package manager.

name: MERN Global Tools
description: TypeScript, Vite, Express generator, nodemon, pnpm, yarn, and common frontend/backend CLI tools.
command: npm install -g typescript ts-node vite create-vite express-generator nodemon pnpm yarn npm-check-updates eslint prettier

name: MongoDB Community Server
description: Document database commonly used in MERN projects.

name: MongoDB Compass
description: GUI for MongoDB databases.

name: .NET SDK
description: C# and .NET SDK for console, web, API, desktop, and cloud development.

name: PHP
description: PHP runtime for web development.

name: Composer
description: PHP dependency manager used by Laravel and Symfony.

name: Zig
description: Zig programming language toolchain.

name: Go
description: Go programming language.

name: Rust
description: Rust toolchain through rustup.

name: CMake
description: Cross-platform C/C++ build configuration tool.

name: LLVM / Clang
description: LLVM compiler tools including clang and clang++.

name: MSYS2 / MinGW
description: Unix-like build environment and GCC toolchain for Windows.

name: Ninja Build
description: Fast build system often used with CMake.

name: PostgreSQL
description: Relational database for backend and data projects.

name: MySQL
description: Relational database used in many web and enterprise stacks.

name: DB Browser for SQLite
description: Lightweight GUI for SQLite databases.

name: Google Chrome
description: Fast mainstream browser for web development and testing.

name: Firefox Developer Edition
description: Firefox browser channel focused on web developers.

name: Brave Browser
description: Chromium-based browser with privacy-oriented defaults.

name: MIT OpenCourseWare
description: Free MIT course materials, including CS and engineering classes.

name: Harvard CS50
description: Excellent introductory computer science course.

name: Google Developer Learning
description: Google courses, codelabs, Android, cloud, web, and AI learning resources.

name: Microsoft Learn
description: Microsoft courses for .NET, Azure, GitHub, AI, Windows, and developer tools.

name: freeCodeCamp
description: Free full-stack, data, backend, and certification courses.

name: roadmap.sh
description: Developer roadmaps for frontend, backend, DevOps, AI, databases, and more.

name: YouTube CS Course Pack
description: Opens a curated starter set: freeCodeCamp, MIT OpenCourseWare, Neso Academy, Abdul Bari, Fireship, ThePrimeagen, and Computerphile.
command: Start-Process 'https://www.youtube.com/@freecodecamp'; Start-Process 'https://www.youtube.com/@mitocw'; Start-Process 'https://www.youtube.com/@nesoacademy'; Start-Process 'https://www.youtube.com/@abdul_bari'; Start-Process 'https://www.youtube.com/@Fireship'; Start-Process 'https://www.youtube.com/@ThePrimeTimeagen'; Start-Process 'https://www.youtube.com/@Computerphile'
